title: Four Against Darkness - Deep Dive Part 7 - The Mists of Warunor - Part 2
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NvFqtHcCCXs

Daniel (@dungeondive) continues his deep dive into the Mists of Warunor campaign expansion, showcasing the mechanics of exploring the Plains of Warunor. This episode focuses on how to generate and navigate the overland terrain as you search for six clues to uncover the source of the mysterious fog plaguing the village. The gameplay demonstrates encounter tables, terrain events, and the flexible approach to structuring exploration in Four Against Darkness—a game that excels at giving you the bones of an adventure and letting you flesh out the details.

While the expansion's wording could be clearer in places, the video reveals just how much content you can create from a few pages of rules and charts. The episode touches on how discoveries like strange melodies and dark elves can spark creative storytelling, emphasizing why journaling your adventures really makes Four Against Darkness shine. By the end, you'll appreciate how the game encourages you to connect the narrative dots and build your own solutions when the text gets ambiguous.

----

Have you played through the Mists of Warunor campaign? What was your experience with the plains exploration—did you find the wording clear, or did you have to homebrew some mechanics to make it work?
